0.$description: Zero spacing step for removing gaps, margins, and padding.

1.$description: Raw spacing step 1 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

2.$description: Raw spacing step 2 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

3.$description: Raw spacing step 3 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

4.$description: Raw spacing step 4 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

5.$description: Raw spacing step 5 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

6.$description: Raw spacing step 6 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

8.$description: Raw spacing step 8 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

10.$description: Raw spacing step 10 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

12.$description: Raw spacing step 12 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

16.$description: Raw spacing step 16 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

20.$description: Raw spacing step 20 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

24.$description: Raw spacing step 24 used as the base scale for gaps, margins, and padding.

xs.$description: Extra small gap between related layout items.

sm.$description: Small gap between related layout items.

md.$description: Medium gap between related layout items.

lg.$description: Large gap between related layout items.

xl.$description: Extra large gap between related layout items.

xs.$description: Extra small inset padding inside components and containers.

sm.$description: Small inset padding inside components and containers.

md.$description: Medium inset padding inside components and containers.

lg.$description: Large inset padding inside components and containers.

xl.$description: Extra large inset padding inside components and containers.

section.$description: Default vertical spacing between major page sections.

page.$description: Default outer page padding for broad layouts.

sans.$description: Default sans-serif font stack for product UI.

mono.$description: Monospace font stack for code, numbers, and technical content.

xsmall.$description: Extra small font size of 12px for captions and fine print.

small.$description: Small font size of 14px for labels and secondary text.

p.$description: Paragraph baseline font size of 16px (body text).

regular.$description: Regular font weight for default text.

medium.$description: Medium font weight for labels and moderate emphasis.

semibold.$description: Semibold font weight for strong emphasis.

bold.$description: Bold font weight for maximum text emphasis.

tighter.$description: Tighter letter spacing for large display text.

tight.$description: Tight letter spacing for headings and titles.

normal.$description: Default letter spacing for body text and controls.

wide.$description: Wide letter spacing for compact uppercase text.

widest.$description: Widest letter spacing for eyebrow and metadata text.

display.$description: Compact line-height ratio for display typography.

tight.$description: Tight line-height ratio for headings, labels, and controls.

normal.$description: Default line-height ratio for readable body text.

relaxed.$description: Relaxed line-height ratio for long-form text.

sm.$description: Small viewport breakpoint used by responsive layouts.

md.$description: Medium viewport breakpoint used by responsive layouts.

lg.$description: Large viewport breakpoint used by responsive layouts.

xl.$description: Extra large viewport breakpoint used by responsive layouts.

2xl.$description: Double extra large viewport breakpoint used by responsive layouts.

sm.$description: Small elevation shadow for subtle raised surfaces.

md.$description: Medium elevation shadow for cards, menus, and panels.

lg.$description: Large elevation shadow for overlays and prominent surfaces.

xl.$description: Extra large elevation shadow for modals and high-priority overlays.

sticky.$description: Stacking index for sticky interface regions.

fixed.$description: Stacking index for fixed interface regions.

modal-backdrop.$description: Stacking index for modal backdrop layers.

modal.$description: Stacking index for modal dialog layers.

fast.$description: Fast motion duration for brief transitions.

normal.$description: Default motion duration for standard UI transitions.

slow.$description: Slow motion duration for larger or more noticeable transitions.

default.$description: Default easing curve for standard UI transitions.

in.$description: Easing curve for elements entering from rest.

out.$description: Easing curve for elements exiting to rest.

in-out.$description: Easing curve for transitions with both acceleration and deceleration.

sm.$description: Small corner radius for compact controls and surfaces.

md.$description: Medium corner radius for standard controls and surfaces.

lg.$description: Large corner radius for prominent controls and surfaces.

xl.$description: Extra large corner radius for spacious surfaces.

2xl.$description: Double extra large corner radius for highly rounded surfaces.

full.$description: Fully rounded radius for pills, circles, and round indicators.

thin.$description: Thin border width for standard outlines and dividers.

thick.$description: Thick border width for emphasized outlines.

lg.$description: Large border width for focus rings highly emphasized outlines.

disabled.$description: Opacity applied to disabled content and controls.

overlay.$description: Opacity used for modal and page overlays.

placeholder.$description: Opacity used for placeholder text and inactive hints.

xs.$description: Extra small icon size — inline indicators, badges, tags

sm.$description: Small icon size — buttons, form controls

md.$description: Medium icon size — standalone icons, navigation

lg.$description: Large icon size — empty states, feature highlights

xl.$description: Extra large icon size — hero sections, prominent actions
